---
title: "Understanding the Binomial Distribution"
subtitle: "SE01"
toc: false
---

## Overview

A standalone demonstration showing how the Structured Learning Design System can generate a polished, interactive learning page.


::: {.callout-note}
## Learning Objectives
By the end of this session, you will be able to:

- Explain the binomial distribution in epidemiological terms

- Interpret a simple infection probability scenario

- Explore a visualisation of binomial probabilities

- Reflect on the limits of the model in real epidemiology

:::










## Summary
*Session summary placeholder*

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="../index.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Binomial Distribution in Epidemiology</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="binomial-demo-se01-sec01-sp01.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Single Page Demonstration</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
